# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 32 symbols 3 orders 120 max_qty 20 max_notional 1000
cmd reg S0
cmd reg S1
cmd reg S2
cmd limit 3 1 S 0 4 IOC
reject new_limit 1 UnknownSymbol

reject new_limit 1 InvalidPrice

reject cancel 2 UnknownOrder
